name: Ashwin SR
summary: Power Platform Developer designing, building, and shipping enterprise-grade applications on Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, and Power Virtual Agents. I turn manual, paper-and-email business processes into governed, role-based systems on Dataverse, SharePoint, SQL Server, and Azure — work that has cut manual effort by up to 70% for the teams using it. PL-400 certified (Microsoft Power Platform Developer Associate).

highlights: Built an AI-powered Obligation Management app integrating OpenAI via REST API to extract legal obligations from SOW/MSA contracts — cutting manual contract review by ~60%.

Architected a full Dataverse + Dynamics 365 SCM integration pipeline for Warehouse Stock Take, connecting real-time product validation, stock count submission, and automated Counting Journal creation with zero manual re-entry.
Engineered end-to-end India Tax Automation using Power Automate Desktop — automating GST/Income Tax portal logins across 5 entity credentials and eliminating 8+ hours of manual work per week.
Designed the Warehouse Stock Take Canvas App for HealtheCare with DataWedge barcode scanning on Android handhelds, replacing manual paper-based stock counts across multiple sites.
Developed a role-based Infra Asset Numbering app backed by SQL Server, with stored-procedure-driven Asset ID auto-generation and a manager approval workflow with automated email notifications.

Built a back-office Model-Driven App for Warehouse Managers with variance reporting and inline editing; owned the full UAT → Production environment lifecycle with role-based access via the Power Platform Admin Center.

education.degree: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering
